h725a8981g3352g489cgae05g27cc8aec8e2f: I've seen a lot in my day - some good, some bad.
h8740ac43gd97cg4a4bg8ff4g33b5c1b991ae: And I know when I'm being led down a dark path.
h1476a1a5g9503g4a13gb3a6gf1d7e5b92beb: I can't stop you from taking it. But I won't be joining you.
h16f0a9bdg5b27g4f66gbfd6gb72e50b1d0ef: *The tadpole shivers as you hear Wyll's voice within your skull.*
h7b578c8cg5e74g4b83ga153g293c63802243: Godspeed, and may your journey be true.
